title: Cheap Chicken Dinner Ideas Under $10: Crispy Sofrito Rice Bowls
description: When you need cheap chicken dinner ideas under $10 that actually slap, this is your move — bone-in chicken thighs seared golden and nestled over garlicky sofrito rice, all done in one pan. This is the kind of meal your abuela would nod at approvingly, and your wallet will straight up thank you for.

title: Easy Lasagna Recipe From Scratch (No Fancy Stuff Required)
description: This easy lasagna recipe from scratch is the kind of dish that makes people think you spent all day in the kitchen — but between us, it comes together with simple ingredients you probably already have. Layers of rich meat sauce, creamy ricotta, and bubbling melted cheese, all built from the ground up without any shortcuts you'll regret. This is weeknight comfort food that hits like a Sunday dinner at abuela's house.

title: Easy Homemade Chicken Wings Recipe
description: This easy homemade chicken wings recipe gives you perfectly crispy oven-baked wings without the mess of deep frying. Just 4 ingredients, 10 minutes of prep, and 50 minutes in the oven — then toss with your favorite Buffalo or BBQ sauce and dig in.

title: Bacon Egg and Cheese Sandwich on a Croissant
description: The best bacon egg and cheese sandwich recipe is the one you can make at home in 10 minutes flat. We use fresh croissants instead of a bagel or biscuit — buttery, flaky, and the perfect vessel for crispy bacon, fluffy scrambled eggs, and melted cheddar.
keyword: bacon egg and cheese sandwich recipe

title: Potato Lasagna With Creamy White Sauce
description: This potato lasagna with creamy white sauce is a brilliant gluten-free lasagna recipe that replaces pasta noodles with thinly sliced potatoes. Layered with ricotta, mozzarella, sausage, and a rich homemade white sauce — it's hearty, filling, and totally unexpected.
keyword: gluten free lasagna recipe with potatoes

title: Venezuelan Tequeños — Fried Cheese Sticks Recipe
description: This Venezuelan tequeños recipe brings the best fried cheese sticks you'll ever taste straight from Miami's Latin food scene to your kitchen. Crispy homemade dough wrapped around queso blanco, fried until golden — we discovered these at Casabe 305 Bistro in Coral Gables and had to recreate them.
keyword: venezuelan tequenos recipe fried cheese sticks

title: Easy Baked Salmon Recipe — 2 Ingredients
description: This easy baked salmon recipe is almost too simple — just 2 ingredients, one oven, and 30 minutes. Italian dressing acts as both a marinade and a glaze, keeping the salmon incredibly moist and flavorful. One of the easiest weeknight dinners you'll ever make.
keyword: easy baked salmon recipe simple ingredients

title: Easy Egg White Omelette Recipe
description: This easy egg white omelette recipe is the quickest healthy breakfast you can make — just 2 eggs, a little cheese, and your choice of meat, ready in under 2 minutes. Light, fluffy, and endlessly customizable.
